Operation 'renameTag' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is completely missing, making it impossible for AI agents to understand inputs, outputs, or side effects. Added details about required parameters (current tag ID and new name), the scope of the operation (affects all associated items), and the return value. Clarified that this is a rename operation with cascading effects on all tagged articles.

data.description_suggestion: Renames an existing tag or folder to a new name. Requires the current tag identifier and the desired new name. All articles previously tagged with the old tag name will be automatically updated to use the new tag name. Returns confirmation of the rename operation. This operation affects all items associated with the tag across the entire subscription.
data.reasoning: Description is completely missing, making it impossible for AI agents to understand inputs, outputs, or side effects. Added details about required parameters (current tag ID and new name), the scope of the operation (affects all associated items), and the return value. Clarified that this is a rename operation with cascading effects on all tagged articles.

message: Operation 'deleteTag' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, inconsistent_terminology. Description is missing entirely. The path uses 'disable-tag' but summary says 'delete', creating terminology inconsistency. Added clarification that this removes the tag itself (not articles), required input parameters, output confirmation, and important side effects. Clarified the permanent nature and scope of the operation to help AI agents understand the consequences.

data.description_suggestion: Removes a tag or folder and its associations from the user's account. Requires the tag identifier to be deleted. Articles previously tagged with this tag will have the tag removed but will not be deleted. Returns confirmation of the deletion. This operation is permanent and affects all items that were tagged with the deleted tag.
data.reasoning: Description is missing entirely. The path uses 'disable-tag' but summary says 'delete', creating terminology inconsistency. Added clarification that this removes the tag itself (not articles), required input parameters, output confirmation, and important side effects. Clarified the permanent nature and scope of the operation to help AI agents understand the consequences.

data.current_description: Mark all articles in a stream as read.
data.description_suggestion: Marks all articles in a specified stream as read. Requires the stream identifier (e.g., feed URL, label, or system stream like 'reading-list'). Updates the read status for all unread articles in that stream. Returns confirmation of the operation and the number of articles marked as read. This operation affects the unread count and reading state across the user's account.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented, but description lacks critical details. Missing specification of which stream/feed to mark as read (required input), what the operation returns, and side effects on unread counts. Added details about stream identifier format, return value including count of affected articles, and impact on account-wide unread status to improve AI agent interpretability.
